zh.Wath upon Dearne, Yorkshire, England, Un: 英國英格蘭越可爾沃斯 武朋 迪亞爾

zh.Swinton by New Malton, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾史雲頓 白 劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Tison於大約1110年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾史雲頓 白 劍橋大學默里 馬爾頓時，她的父親Adam Tison17歲，母親Emma27歲。她於1148年與Henry de Hughes Sr在英國素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1191年之後。

nameMeanings.name: Tison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from Old French tison ‘piece of wood’ and ‘firebrand’, in the latter sense perhaps denoting someone with a fiery temperament.
French (Nord and Pas-de-Calais): ethnic name from a derivative of Old French teis ‘German, Flemish’, from ancient Germanic theod ‘people’. Compare Teson and Tesson .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Theissen   or   Theisen  . Compare   Tyson  .

variants.name: Tesson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Arnaud, Elmire, Gaston, Pierre.
French (mainly Vendée and Normandy): from tesson, a dialect word meaning ‘badger’, applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way.
Altered form of French   Tison  . Compare   Teson  .

variants.name: Teson
meanings: Altered form of French   Tison  . Compare   Tesson  .

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Tison was born about 1110, in Swinton by New Malton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam Tison, was 17 and her mother, Emma, was 27. She married Henry de Hughes Sr in 1148, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died after 1191.

ko.Wath upon Dearne, Yorkshire, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓h 업 디른

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Tison(이)가 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스윈턴 비 뉴 맬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Tison(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1148년 영국 수세스에서 Henry de Hughes Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Tison родилась около 1110 г. в местности свинтон би ню малтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam Tison было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Hughes Sr в 1148 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла после 1191 г.
